message:
feat: add Series.is_monotonic() alias for pandas parity

Add is_monotonic() as an alias for is_monotonic_increasing() on Series,
matching the deprecated-but-still-present pd.Series.is_monotonic
property that many codebases still reference.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
